message:
🐛 Fix leaderboard missing issue-only contributors (#1234)

The leaderboard generation script only discovered contributors via
the GitHub /repos/{repo}/contributors API, which only returns users
with commits. Contributors who only filed issues (no PRs/commits)
were never discovered and never scored.

Add a second discovery step that searches for issue authors via the
GitHub Search API, so issue-only contributors like rishi-jat are
included on the leaderboard.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
